description_long: This is a compact, rectangular filing cabinet constructed from wood with a warm, reddish-brown finish and a subtle, natural wood grain pattern visible on all sides. The front face features three evenly spaced drawers, each with a horizontal recessed groove serving as a handle, giving the cabinet a minimalist and modern appearance. The sides and back are solid panels with the same wood grain texture, and there are no visible hardware elements such as locks or label holders. The top surface is flat and sturdy, suitable for placing office items or small equipment. The cabinet's overall build suggests it is designed for indoor use, likely in an office or home workspace, and its size makes it easy to fit under desks or in tight spaces. The drawers are likely to be hollow inside, providing storage for documents or supplies.
description: A compact, three-drawer wooden filing cabinet with a reddish-brown wood grain finish and recessed horizontal handles. Its minimalist design and flat top make it suitable for office or home use.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with horizontal recessed handles and a clear wood grain pattern.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a solid wood panel and the side profiles of the three drawers.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted wood panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, with the side profiles of the drawers visible.
